goals: Explore the directory structure of a project to understand its organization
Find files related to a specific topic or naming pattern
Examine the content of relevant files to understand what they contain

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn, but unfamiliar with technical tools. Asks questions to understand how things work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows basic history concepts but has limited technical knowledge. Doesn't know how to use code search tools.

end_condition: The student has successfully explored the project structure, found relevant files, and understands the content.
